ticket.subject: Charged $499 last month but my plan is the $99 Pro tier
ticket.body: My April invoice shows a $499 charge, but our subscription page confirms we're on Pro ($99/month). The invoice has three line items I don't recognize: 'Compute add-on $250', 'Bandwidth overage $100', and 'Storage tier upgrade $50'. We didn't change anything — please clarify what these are or refund the difference.
